<!--
Thanks for contributing to CommitArc!
Keep the title in Conventional Commits form, e.g. "feat(report): add X" or "fix(github): handle Y".
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor / perf
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore / build / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows **Conventional Commits** (see [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md))
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (type-checks the whole project)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env*`, or `data/` committed
- [ ] Theming uses CSS variables / Tailwind tokens (light + dark both work)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or architecture changed (README / CLAUDE.md)

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- UI changes? Add before/after screenshots. Anything reviewers should know. -->
